title: Floating Lines
description: Three.js ShaderMaterial sinusoidal line waves that float and parallax-shift with mouse movement, creating an elegant depth-layered background.
prompt_text:
# Floating Lines

Three.js ShaderMaterial sinusoidal line waves that float and parallax-shift with mouse movement, creating an elegant depth-layered background.

## Use when
- Adding a calm, technical atmosphere to a dark landing page.
- Creating a parallax depth effect behind product or hero content.
- Using as a minimal decorative background that evolves gently.

## Stack
- Framework: react
- Libraries: three

## Install
```bash
npm install three
```

## Component — floating-lines.tsx
```tsx
// Source: animations_014.md
// Export: FloatingLines (default, also FloatingLinesShowcase)
// Props: className, lineCount (number), lineColor (string), speed (number),
//   amplitude (number), frequency (number), parallaxStrength (number)
// Uses Three.js BufferGeometry line segments + ShaderMaterial
// Mouse parallax applied via uniform updates in animation loop
// See full source in raw/animations_014.md
```

## Notes
- Requires Three.js (>600 KB). Lazy-load for performance.
